title: Migrate Replicated Control Plane To Use Cloud Controller Manager — Special case: migrating the Node IPAM controller
text:
If your cloud provider provides an implementation of Node IPAM controller, you should
switch to the implementation in
cloud-controller-manager
. Disable Node IPAM
controller in
kube-controller-manager
of version N + 1 by adding
--controllers=*,-nodeipam
to its flags. Then add
nodeipam
to the list of migrated
controllers.
# wildcard version, with nodeipam
kind
:
LeaderMigrationConfiguration
apiVersion
:
controllermanager.config.k8s.io/v1
leaderName
:
cloud-provider-extraction-migration
resourceLock
:
leases
controllerLeaders
:
-
name
:
route
component
:
*
-
name
:
service
component
:
*
-
name
:
cloud-node-lifecycle
component
:
*
-
name
:
nodeipam
-
component
:
*
